title: When You Sleep
meaning_summary: Its balance of melody and distortion keeps it highly replayable for both niche listeners and newer catalog explorers.
revenue_drivers: Shoegaze and alternative playlists sustain discovery.
Long-tail fan listening keeps the song active over time.
Genre influence helps maintain ongoing catalog relevance.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: When You Sleep is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
